response.justification: Mohammed is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong expertise in TypeScript, distributed systems, and software craftsmanship. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions, as his resume only indicates very recent exposure to AI agents and MCP. Furthermore, he lacks demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, which are critical for this GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with previous Staff-level and Founder roles.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and Node.js, matching part of the required technology stack.
Demonstrated recent exposure to multi-agent workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Fails to meet the strict requirement of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions, with AI experience appearing very recent.
Lacks documented experience with Python, vector databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Cloud platform architecture experience (AWS) appears limited compared to the deep infrastructure expertise expected at the Staff level.
